brand.name: Quantum Jade
brand.tagline: A Hong Kong-licensed independent asset manager delivering bespoke global investment solutions to ultra-high-net-worth families and institutions.

home.hero_title: We are committed to providing our clients with exceptional service, empowering them to stand out in the competition.

clients.title: Clients & case studies
clients.cross_border_desc: Based in Hong Kong, this international financial hub, we provide customized offshore asset allocation solutions for ultra-high-net-worth families with a forward-looking global perspective, helping wealth to be steadily passed on across generations and cycles.
clients.advisory_desc: Rejecting product-driven traditional models, we always adhere to an absolutely neutral buy-side position. We deeply understand the underlying needs of institutional clients and build highly personalized investment portfolios that adapt to complex market environments for you.
clients.tech_desc: We deeply integrate cutting-edge financial technology into our research system. Through data-driven macroeconomic insights and systematic risk control models, we accurately capture alpha returns and provide a solid moat for every commitment you make.

clients_points: Cross-border asset allocation / Family office solutions
home.news_intro: Documenting Quantum Jade's latest corporate updates and team culture. We firmly believe that the driving force behind our steady progress is a highly cohesive professional team. Here, we share the institution's developmental milestones and our collective growth.
home.news_events_intro: Stay updated with our latest industry insights, market perspectives, and corporate news.

clients.title: Trusted Fiduciary
clients.description: Acting as an independent, buy-side advocate, we deliver highly bespoke wealth management solutions to a select group of high-net-worth individuals. At Quantum Jade, we prioritize qualitative depth over mass expansion, ensuring an exceptional level of dedicated service and bandwidth for our core clients. Through tailored global asset allocation and sophisticated wealth structuring, we serve as a trusted fiduciary partner, safeguarding long-term capital appreciation and seamless intergenerational wealth transfer.

aum.title: Bespoke Wealth Management
aum.description: We deliver bespoke discretionary mandates and tailored advisory services designed exclusively for sophisticated investors. Our investment scope spans structured products, foreign exchange (FX), options, fixed income, and equities, strictly avoiding standardized or insurance-driven products to ensure complete alignment of interest. Leveraging a robust External Asset Manager (EAM) framework, we have established deep partnerships with Tier-1 global private banks and prime brokers, ensuring client assets are secured under the strictest global custody standards while executing multi-asset allocation with institutional-grade precision.

years.title: Tier-1 Heritage
years.description: Our competitive edge is anchored in a synergistic structure: seasoned strategic leadership combined with elite execution. Led by our founder—an industry veteran with decades of core leadership experience at top-tier global banks—we have ingrained rigorous, institutional-grade risk management protocols into our corporate DNA. Complementing this vision, our core team comprises professionals with extensive frontline investment banking experience. Together, they form a formidable intellectual moat, delivering unmatched proficiency in fundamental asset screening, complex derivatives pricing, and optimal trade execution.

about.title: About us
about.muted: Quantum Jade Investment Limited is an external asset manager (EAM) based in Hong Kong and holds Hong Kong SFC Type 1, Type 4, and Type 9 licenses (CE No. BVU457). As of 10 February 2026, the team advises approximately US$1 billion of assets. We charge management fees and performance fees, depending on client needs and discussions. These fees are typically structured at a rate in excess of the U.S. risk-free rate or under a high-water mark mechanism. The team is currently led by Mr. Wang Yuqi, who has over 20 years of banking experience, and consists of around 10 employees.
about.core_investments: Our core investment capabilities span across structured products, foreign exchange (FX), options, fixed income (bonds), and equities, explicitly excluding any insurance brokerage services.

business_model.title: Our Business Model
business_model.description: Quantum Jade operates on a pure External Asset Manager (EAM) model, ensuring absolute alignment with our clients' interests. Your assets are securely custodied at top-tier global private banks. We actively manage portfolios and execute trades strictly through a Limited Power of Attorney (LPOA), with zero access to client funds. Leveraging deep partnerships with institutions such as DBS, CSC Financial, Julius Baer, Leonteq, VP Bank, and LGT Bank, we provide objective, cross-market pricing. Free from single-institution sales targets, we act solely as a buy-side advisor to secure the optimal assets and execution channels for you.

diagram.entities: Entities: CLIENT, PRIVATE BANK, EAM, BUSINESS MODEL

You must keep the information in this presentation confidential and may not reproduce or share any of the information without Quantum Jade's prior written permission.

services.title: Services
services.intro: Quantum Jade delivers an end-to-end institutional wealth management platform. We seamlessly integrate objective advisory, agile execution, and robust operations to protect and grow your wealth across market cycles with absolute alignment of interest.
services.advisory_desc: Objective, research-driven investment guidance. We design bespoke asset allocation frameworks and conduct rigorous due diligence, placing your interests above all.
services.implementation_desc: Institutional-grade execution and portfolio construction. Leveraging top-tier investment bank channels, we deliver agile multi-asset trading and strict bank-grade risk monitoring.
services.operations_desc: Robust infrastructure for complex cross-market investments. We ensure precision in post-trade reconciliation, transparent reporting, and strict adherence to compliance standards.
services.consulting_intro: As an independent external asset manager (EAM) based in Hong Kong, Quantum Jade Investment Limited is committed to providing objective and professional investment advisory services. Navigating the complex and ever-changing global capital markets, we operate independently from any single financial institution, placing your interests above all. Leveraging rigorous research logic and deep industry insights, we provide you with bespoke wealth management frameworks and strategic guidance to help you navigate market cycles and advance steadily through an ever-changing environment.
services.consulting_desc: Asset allocation, investment strategy design, specialized research.

consulting.value_desc: Provide measurable and executable recommendations to help clients make efficient decisions.

services.implementation_desc: Portfolio construction, trade execution, risk monitoring.
services.implementation_intro: Leveraging the core team's 30+ years of top-tier investment bank (Goldman Sachs, CICC, Credit Suisse) management experience, we translate cycle-tested strategies into institution-grade, operational services. We use agile portfolio construction to defend against inflation, rely on deep institutional execution channels (at no additional cost to clients), and apply world-class risk-control standards to ensure operational practices are fully aligned with client interests.

implementation.item1: Portfolio construction: Dynamically rebalance based on macro regimes to build resilient, cross-cycle portfolios that defend against inflation.
implementation.item2: Trading & execution: Share top-tier investment bank execution channels so clients incur no additional fees while benefiting from efficient order execution.
implementation.item3: Risk & monitoring: Apply bank-grade risk frameworks (e.g., Goldman-level) to monitor and safeguard cross-market asset safety boundaries in real time.
implementation.delivery_desc: Covers both project-based and retainer service models. We establish point-to-point communication and feedback workflows to meet each client’s customized business needs. Through meticulous daily tracking and rigorous execution standards, we ensure precise responsiveness and reliable delivery for both routine and unexpected requests.

services.operations_intro: Our operations backbone is designed to provide robust infrastructure support for complex cross-market investments. Through standardized process management and multi-dimensional validation mechanisms, we continuously track the post-trade lifecycle of assets. The team aligns execution details closely with clients' operational scenarios to ensure instructions are executed accurately, properly recorded, and presented with high transparency within a compliant framework.

daily.item1: Reporting & disclosure: Establish regular communication rhythms and deliver clear, detailed asset status tracking and portfolio accounting reports according to client reporting cycles.
daily.item2: Compliance & audit coordination: Support internal and external audit and compliance reviews with full transaction trail records, document support, and cross-data reconciliation.
daily.item3: Clearing & reconciliation: Apply standardized post-trade reconciliation procedures to ensure integrity and traceability of cash flows, asset confirmation and distribution records.

operations.response_desc: We maintain a dedicated client support team for end-to-end follow-up on routine queries and bespoke operational requests. Leveraging formal feedback workflows, we ensure timely assessment and pragmatic handling of client needs. While upholding compliance standards, the team applies meticulous execution controls to resolve operational frictions and ensure smooth business operations.

services.operations_desc: Reporting and disclosure, compliance integration, data services.

careers.title: Careers
careers.page_intro: Quantum Jade treats professional talent as the firm's most important asset. We strive to build a disciplined, efficient, and collaborative work environment. Here, we look for colleagues with strong analytical skills, rigorous logical thinking, and high professional integrity to uphold compliance and create long-term value in a dynamic financial market.
careers.core_adv1_desc: Based in Hong Kong's international financial center, we leverage deep industry experience and broad market networks to provide the team with wide business visibility. We rely on professional infrastructure and a compliance framework to ensure stable business operations.
careers.core_adv2_desc: We embrace compliance-first, research-driven principles and promote rational, objective business discussions. We reject blind following and encourage independent thinking based on data and rigorous logical validation.
careers.core_adv3_desc: We establish scientific talent evaluation and internal promotion systems, focusing on long-term career development. For professionals at different stages, we provide matching industry resources and continuous skill training.
careers.intern_intro: Quantum Jade's internship program is a core pathway for identifying and developing outstanding talent in the financial industry. We provide promising students with an industry-standard professional practice environment, aiming to cultivate future professionals with solid foundations and compliance discipline through sustained practical training and rigorous evaluation.
careers.intern_point1_desc: Leveraging the firm's platform resources, we offer interns a structured opportunity to understand the basic operating mechanisms of finance and banking. The program begins with core industry fundamentals, helping candidates clarify market structure, asset management basics, and rigorous compliance standards, building a strong knowledge foundation for entering finance.
careers.intern_point2_desc: The program is designed to select and build long-term relationships. Through tiered task assignments and regular professional reviews, we progressively test and improve candidates' independent work ability and overall professional quality rather than meet short-term, temporary staffing needs.
careers.intern_point3_desc: This program is an important part of Quantum Jade's core talent reserve strategy. Candidates who demonstrate excellent skills, disciplined work attitude, and alignment with company values during the internship may receive a formal offer after internal assessment, starting a long-term career in asset management.

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.section1_text: Quantum Jade Investment Limited (hereinafter "the Company") attaches great importance to and is committed to protecting the privacy of our clients and website visitors. This Privacy Policy outlines how the Company collects, uses, retains, discloses, and protects your personal data. All such operations strictly comply with the Hong Kong Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Chapter 486) and other applicable data protection regulations.
privacy_policy.section2_intro: When you visit our website or conduct business with the Company, we may collect your personal data. The collection purposes are limited to:
privacy_policy.section2_point1: Conducting baseline assessments and due diligence required for providing asset management and related financial services, including anti-money laundering compliance and know-your-customer ("KYC") requirements.
privacy_policy.section2_point2: Processing your service requests, sending administrative notifications, and project updates.
privacy_policy.section2_point3: Responding to lawful inquiries and reviews from regulatory authorities and judicial bodies.
privacy_policy.section3_text: The Company treats all personal data obtained with strict confidentiality. We will never sell, rent, or transfer your personal data to any unrelated third parties without your explicit consent. However, we may conduct controlled disclosure within necessary scope where required by law or to fulfill core services (such as clearing institutions, custodian banks, and designated service providers providing necessary technical support).
privacy_policy.section4_text: The Company has deployed industry-standard physical, electronic, and administrative security architecture to prevent unauthorized access, modification, or data breaches. The retention period of personal data will strictly comply with Hong Kong applicable legal and regulatory record-keeping requirements. Upon expiration, such data will be thoroughly destroyed or anonymized.
privacy_policy.section5_text: Under applicable law, you have the right to access your personal data held by the Company and request correction of any inaccurate information. To exercise these rights or if you have any questions regarding data privacy, please contact us through our official email: info@quantum-jade.com.

terms_policy.title: Terms of Service
terms_policy.section1_text: Quantum Jade Investment Limited is a licensed corporation regulated by the Securities and Futures Commission of Hong Kong (SFC), with Central Entity Number (CE Number) BVU457. By accessing or using this website, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please stop using this website immediately.
terms_policy.section2_text: All information, materials, analysis, and data contained on this website are for general reference only and do not constitute, nor should they be construed as, an offer, solicitation, or professional investment advice to buy or sell any securities, financial products, or participate in any specific trading strategy. Financial markets are inherently uncertain, and past performance is not indicative of future results.
terms_policy.section2_advice: Before making any investment decision, you should seek independent financial, legal, and tax advice.
terms_policy.section3_text: All content on this website, including but not limited to text, charts, logos, icons, images, and underlying code, is owned by the Company or its licensors and is protected by Hong Kong and international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. No one may copy, distribute, modify, or use such content for any commercial purpose without the Company’s prior written permission.
terms_policy.section4_text: The Company strives to ensure the accuracy and timeliness of the information on the website, but makes no express or implied warranties as to the absolute accuracy, completeness, or error-free nature of the information. The Company and its affiliates shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, special, or consequential loss arising from your use of or reliance on the information on this website or from system failures or network delays.
terms_policy.section5_text: These Terms of Service are governed by the laws of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region. Any dispute arising from this website or these Terms shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region.
